description: Routine should produce a journey map with fully-populated stages table, explicit drop-off identification, ranked pain points, ranked opportunities.

input_ticket.title: Journey map: SIA knowledge ingestion flow (first URL ingest)
input_ticket.description: Map the user journey from 'I have a URL I want SIA to remember' through 'I've verified SIA can retrieve and use it'. Identify drop-offs, pain points, opportunities. Evidence: 4 interviews + session recording review.

smoke_questions: Is the stages table fully populated (no 'unknown' or empty cells across stages × dimensions)?
Is the biggest drop-off specific to a stage AND sub-step (not 'somewhere in onboarding')?
Are pain points ranked 1/2/3 with reasoning, not just listed?
Are opportunities phrased as opportunities (not solutions) — 'hand to Designer/PM-lite'?
Are quotes distributed across stages (not all from one stage)?
success_criteria: Stages fully populated + specific drop-off + ranked pain/opportunities + 4+ quotes across stages
